item.title: devops
item.description: Devops Post Linux 1 - Foundation Linux 2 - Terminal Linux Zsh... 3 - Docker - Docker Compose 4 - WebServer Nginx

item.title: Golang Cơ Bản
item.description: Install Golang Windows Go to website and download the latest Golang version: https://go.dev/doc/install Install Setting GOPATH Environment Environmental Variables under Control Panel > System and Security > System > Advanced Settings > Environmental Variables Syntax Each Statement ends with a line break. To comment block code 1/* 2This is block comment in go 3*/ Comment line 1// This is single line comment Variable 1var variable-name datatype = value Condition 1if(condition) { 2 //code block to be executed when if condition evaluates to true 3} Switch Case

item.title: Golang Trang Chủ
item.description: Xin chào m.n 👋 💬 Ask me about: https://fb.com/biccv Học Golang Từ Zero Đến Hero Ngôn Ngữ Lập Trình Máy Tính Lịch sử của golang Terminal Setup Môi trường Ứng dụng Golang Đầu tiên Binary and Decimal Hexadecimal, octal, ASCII, UTF8, Unicode, Runes Variables, constants and basic types Control Statements Functions Packages and imports Package Initialization Types Methods Pointer type Interfaces Go modules Go Module Proxies Unit Tests Arrays Slices Maps Errors Anonymous functions & closures JSON and XML Basic HTTP Server Enum, Iota & Bitmask Dates and time Data storage : files and databases Concurrency Logging Templates Application Configuration Benchmarks Build an HTTP Client Program Profiling Context Generics An object oriented programming language ?

item.title: Overview
item.description: Golang Overview Go language was developed in the year 2007 by Robert Griesemer, Rob Pike, and Ken Thompson at Google and publicly announced in 2009. It was officially released in 2012 as an open-source programming language. Foundation 1 - Foundation 2 - Syntax - Naming Convention Uber 3 - HTTP - API 4 - GRPC 5 - GRPC Gateway 6 - Tutorial Build a Project

item.title: Tools
item.description: This page group resource all tool related golang maybe you need it Release version in golang: https://goreleaser.com/quick-start/ Host static resource in a binary https://github.com/rakyll/statik Go-mansory: Framework Go-Fx: Dependency Injection
